posts.author: SenorTrumper
posts.title: Should American hero Daniel Penny sue that fat pig Alvin Bragg for racially prosecuting him?

link_metadata.description: After a grand jury indicted Marine veteran Daniel Penny over the subway chokehold death of Jordan Neely, a Manhattan jury later acquitted him of all criminal charges. Now his legal team is weighing a malicious‑prosecution lawsuit against DA Alvin Bragg, arguing the case was driven by politics, media pressure, and fear of riots—not evidence. They say Bragg pushed charges “to protect his image,” blurred ethical lines, and ignored the reality that Penny acted to protect passengers from violent threats. Even Sen. Ted Cruz has called on Penny to sue and “hold this rogue prosecutor accountable.”Do YOU support Daniel Penny suing Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg for malicious prosecution and forcing Soros‑backed prosecutors to finally pay a price when they target Good Samaritans?YES or NO?
link_metadata.title: The Raging Patriot (@theragingpatriot)
